analysis
def analyze_scores(scores):
    if not scores:
        return {
            'average_score': 0
            'highest_score': 0
            'lowest_score': 0
            'passed': 0
            'failed': 0
        }
    avg = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    high = max(scores)
    low = min(scores)
    passed = sum(1 for s in scores if s >= 60)
    failed = len(scores) - passed
    return {
        'average_score': avg
        'highest_score': high
        'lowest_score': low
        'passed': passed
        'failed': failed
    }
